note: Mathlib/Combinatorics/Additive/ApproximateSubgroup.lean:60 — structure IsApproximateSubgroup (K : ℝ) (A : Set G) : Prop (one_mem, inv_eq_self, sq_covBySMul) is exactly Tao's K-approximate-subgroup notion; docstring cites Tointon's 'Introduction to approximate groups'.

Mathlib/MeasureTheory/Measure/Stieltjes.lean:110 — StieltjesFunction (monotone, right-continuous f) builds the Lebesgue–Stieltjes measure; this is the measure-theoretic relative, not the classical Riemann-sum/partition-tag Riemann–Stieltjes integral (no such construction found under any name).
Mathlib/GroupTheory/PGroup.lean:26 — def IsPGroup (p) (G) : Prop := ∀ g : G, ∃ k, g ^ p ^ k = 1, the standard order-is-a-power-of-p definition.

Mathlib/RepresentationTheory/Basic.lean:49 — abbrev Representation k G V := G →* (V →ₗ[k] V) is the monoid/group-action instance of the general 'representation' concept (Wikipedia's article is broader: Lie algebras, categories, etc. are not covered by this single decl).
